steps.name: inventory-runtime-system
steps.last_known_state: InventorySystem is implemented and attached to Systems in Stage1. InteractionSystem can award item pickups and check selected item requirements.
steps.next_action: Open the next Harness unit for InventoryUI.prefab or room-specific item pickup hotspot placement.

decision_log.decision: User instructed Codex to continue until the final result and always approve Harness work.
Standing approval applied as approved_for_implementation for the scoped InventoryRuntimeSystem unit.

steps.resume_prompt: InventoryRuntimeSystem is complete. Continue with InventoryUI.prefab or room-specific item pickup hotspot placement.
